target: 16. Evidence Video
July 23
(Well, the phone from yesterday…)

Crap…
It's perfectly <color=#GF_KEY_MI2_DOUGA>recorded</color> you know…!

(If it's already been recorded,
I can't just ignore it)
(First and foremost, I need to warn Mio about the danger…)
Mio, can I talk to you for a second?
Yeah, what's up?
I want you to see a video.
Huh? What? What kind of video?
It's one I took last night…

Oh really?
What's in it?

W-what is this…?
I-I'm…?

That was someone who appeared
in front of my house before 9 PM last night.

Then they looked up at the second floor
for five minutes before disappearing into the mountains…

Who… is that…!
That's me…!

No.
You were taking a bath at that time.
…Yeah.

That's a Shadow…
That kind of thing.

Hey…
You know about the Shadow Sickness, right?

Mio… that thing came to kill you.
To kill you…

W-why me…!
To kill me…!

Here… zoom in.
At the hand…

No… that's not possible…
Carrying a knife…

The Shadow Sickness…
It's not just a superstition…
I knew it…!!!

Ushio too… saw it, right?
Three days before she died…!

I see… Shinpei.
You heard about the Shadow from my sister, didn't you?
Huh…
(Actually, I heard it from you…)

…Anyway, I saw it too.
Your Shadow, yesterday… yeah…
Hey… Shinpei.

My sister… might have been killed…
By a Shadow!!!

Honestly… it sounds crazy.
But once you see it…
I saw a Shadow… copying people.

Wh-what!?
Copying…?

Yeah.
It was copying…!
Like a camera… with a flash…

(…?
The flash… it was glowing…?)

Hey!! Who was that!?
That's not a photo!!

(…Flash…?
Why here…--)

That's right!!
It flashed during the funeral too!
Huh?

No one had a camera then.
Which means…!

( Damn…
That flash was the Shadow entering the funeral
and copying someone…! )

Wait, Shinpei.
What are you talking about with the flash during the funeral?

…What?
You don't remember?

You know… after I put flowers in Ushio's coffin!
It went "Pika"!
There was a commotion, right?
Y-you don't remember!?
U-uh… yeah…
(No… wait!?)

(There were two times the commotion happened.
Once during the first funeral and once during the previous one…)

(But this time… there wasn't any!
The flash wasn't glowing!)

(That means the Shadow in the funeral
didn't copy anyone this time!)
Hey… Shinpei.

(Why!?
The Shadow copied someone both times…
But this time it didn't!)
Shinpei!
(What did I do differently this time!?)
Shinpei!!!

Stop thinking about it later.
Tell Shiori about the Shadow!

The Shadow coming to kill you isn't a superstition!
Shiori could be in danger too!!!
(That's right… Shiori also said she saw her Shadow)

(Shiori might be targeted too.
It's definitely dangerous)
(That's why I can't let Mio get close to this danger…)

Let's go now!
Shiori's house!
Yeah…
…but I'll go alone.
Huh? Why!?

Mio, wait for me.
…I'm asking you.

(…I forced Mio to stay behind
and headed to Koba Mart alone)

(I completely understand Mio's feelings.
With Ushio's situation, she couldn't just stay still)

(But the Shadow is dangerous.
I can't take Mio with me)
(Of course, I'm also worried about leaving Mio alone…)

(Considering they sneak around and disguise themselves,
it's unlikely they'll attack in a crowded place)

(It's safer for her to be at Koba Mart
where there are many people
than to be with me)
…I hope Shiori's okay.

Listen…
Shiori.
You're always with your parents, right?

Even if there's a girl who looks just like you,
don't get close to her…
(Although I already warned Shiori at the funeral…)
(please… stay safe…)
